   516тЖТ
   517тЖТ// =============================================================================
   518тЖТ// Maximo Integration Metrics
   519тЖТ// =============================================================================
   520тЖТ
   521тЖТ/**
   522тЖТ * Maximo integration metrics for sync operations and polling fallback
   523тЖТ *
   524тЖТ * @see specs/007-integration.md Section 7.11.2
   525тЖТ */
   526тЖТexport const maximoMetrics = {
   527тЖТ  // Sync operations
   528тЖТ  syncRequestsTotal: new Counter({
   529тЖТ    name: 'mms_maximo_sync_requests_total',
   530тЖТ    help: 'Total number of Maximo sync requests',
   531тЖТ    labelNames: ['operation', 'status'] as const,
   532тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   533тЖТ  }),
   534тЖТ  syncDuration: new Histogram({
   535тЖТ    name: 'mms_maximo_sync_duration_seconds',
   536тЖТ    help: 'Maximo sync operation duration in seconds',
   537тЖТ    labelNames: ['operation'] as const,
   538тЖТ    buckets: [0.1, 0.5, 1, 5, 10, 30, 60, 120],
   539тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   540тЖТ  }),
   541тЖТ  syncRecordsProcessed: new Counter({
   542тЖТ    name: 'mms_maximo_sync_records_processed_total',
   543тЖТ    help: 'Total number of records processed during sync',
   544тЖТ    labelNames: ['operation', 'result'] as const,
   545тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   546тЖТ  }),
   547тЖТ
   548тЖТ  // Webhook metrics
   549тЖТ  webhooksReceived: new Counter({
   550тЖТ    name: 'mms_maximo_webhooks_received_total',
   551тЖТ    help: 'Total number of webhooks received from Maximo',
   552тЖТ    labelNames: ['event_type', 'status'] as const,
   553тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   554тЖТ  }),
   555тЖТ  webhookProcessingDuration: new Histogram({
   556тЖТ    name: 'mms_maximo_webhook_processing_duration_seconds',
   557тЖТ    help: 'Webhook processing duration in seconds',
   558тЖТ    labelNames: ['event_type'] as const,
   559тЖТ    buckets: [0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 1, 2.5, 5],
   560тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   561тЖТ  }),
   562тЖТ  webhookLastReceivedAt: new Gauge({
   563тЖТ    name: 'mms_maximo_webhook_last_received_timestamp',
   564тЖТ    help: 'Timestamp of last webhook received (Unix epoch)',
   565тЖТ    labelNames: ['depot_id'] as const,
   566тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   567тЖТ  }),
   568тЖТ
   569тЖТ  // Polling fallback metrics
   570тЖТ  pollingTriggered: new Counter({
   571тЖТ    name: 'mms_maximo_polling_triggered_total',
   572тЖТ    help: 'Total number of polling jobs triggered',
   573тЖТ    labelNames: ['trigger_reason'] as const,
   574тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   575тЖТ  }),
   576тЖТ  pollingRecordsFound: new Counter({
   577тЖТ    name: 'mms_maximo_polling_records_found_total',
   578тЖТ    help: 'Total number of records found during polling',
   579тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   580тЖТ  }),
   581тЖТ  pollingDuration: new Histogram({
   582тЖТ    name: 'mms_maximo_polling_duration_seconds',
   583тЖТ    help: 'Polling operation duration in seconds',
   584тЖТ    buckets: [0.5, 1, 5, 10, 30, 60, 120],
   585тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   586тЖТ  }),
   587тЖТ  pollingFallbackActive: new Gauge({
   588тЖТ    name: 'mms_maximo_polling_fallback_active',
   589тЖТ    help: 'Whether polling fallback is currently active (1=active, 0=inactive)',
   590тЖТ    labelNames: ['depot_id'] as const,
   591тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   592тЖТ  }),
   593тЖТ
   594тЖТ  // Sync mode metrics
   595тЖТ  syncMode: new Gauge({
   596тЖТ    name: 'mms_maximo_sync_mode',
   597тЖТ    help: 'Current sync mode (0=webhook, 1=polling, 2=hybrid)',
   598тЖТ    labelNames: ['depot_id'] as const,
   599тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   600тЖТ  }),
   601тЖТ
   602тЖТ  // Deduplication metrics
   603тЖТ  duplicatesPrevented: new Counter({
   604тЖТ    name: 'mms_maximo_duplicates_prevented_total',
   605тЖТ    help: 'Total number of duplicate updates prevented',
   606тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   607тЖТ  }),
   608тЖТ
   609тЖТ  // Circuit breaker metrics
   610тЖТ  circuitBreakerState: new Gauge({
   611тЖТ    name: 'mms_maximo_circuit_breaker_state',
   612тЖТ    help: 'Circuit breaker state (0=closed, 1=open, 2=half-open)',
   613тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   614тЖТ  }),

   618тЖТ    registers: [registry],

   620тЖТ

   622тЖТ  conflictsDetected: new Counter({

   624тЖТ    help: 'Total number of sync conflicts detected',
   625тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   626тЖТ  }),
   627тЖТ  conflictsResolved: new Counter({
   628тЖТ    name: 'mms_maximo_conflicts_resolved_total',
   629тЖТ    help: 'Total number of sync conflicts resolved',
   630тЖТ    labelNames: ['resolution'] as const,
   631тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   632тЖТ  }),
   633тЖТ
   634тЖТ  // Shadow record metrics
   635тЖТ  shadowRecordsPending: new Gauge({
   636тЖТ    name: 'mms_maximo_shadow_records_pending',
   637тЖТ    help: 'Number of shadow records pending sync',
   638тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   639тЖТ  }),
   640тЖТ  shadowRecordsConflict: new Gauge({
   641тЖТ    name: 'mms_maximo_shadow_records_conflict',
   642тЖТ    help: 'Number of shadow records in conflict state',
   643тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   644тЖТ  }),
   645тЖТ  shadowRecordsError: new Gauge({
   646тЖТ    name: 'mms_maximo_shadow_records_error',
   647тЖТ    help: 'Number of shadow records in error state',
   648тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   649тЖТ  }),
   650тЖТ};
   651тЖТ
   652тЖТ/**
   653тЖТ * Record Maximo sync operation
   654тЖТ */
   655тЖТexport function recordMaximoSync(
   656тЖТ  operation: 'push' | 'pull' | 'full' | 'polling',
   657тЖТ  status: 'success' | 'failure' | 'partial',
   658тЖТ  durationMs: number,
   659тЖТ  recordsProcessed: number,
   660тЖТ  recordsUpdated: number
   661тЖТ): void {
   662тЖТ  maximoMetrics.syncRequestsTotal.inc({ operation, status });
   663тЖТ  maximoMetrics.syncDuration.observe({ operation }, durationMs / 1000);
   664тЖТ  maximoMetrics.syncRecordsProcessed.inc({ operation, result: 'processed' }, recordsProcessed);
   665тЖТ  maximoMetrics.syncRecordsProcessed.inc({ operation, result: 'updated' }, recordsUpdated);
   666тЖТ}
   667тЖТ
   668тЖТ/**
   669тЖТ * Record webhook received
   670тЖТ */
   671тЖТexport function recordMaximoWebhook(
   672тЖТ  eventType: string,
   673тЖТ  status: 'success' | 'failure',
   674тЖТ  durationMs: number,
   675тЖТ  depotId?: string
   676тЖТ): void {
   677тЖТ  maximoMetrics.webhooksReceived.inc({ event_type: eventType, status });
   678тЖТ  maximoMetrics.webhookProcessingDuration.observe({ event_type: eventType }, durationMs / 1000);
   679тЖТ  if (status === 'success') {
   680тЖТ    maximoMetrics.webhookLastReceivedAt.set({ depot_id: depotId ?? 'global' }, Date.now() / 1000);
   681тЖТ  }
   682тЖТ}
   683тЖТ
   684тЖТ/**
   685тЖТ * Record polling fallback activation
   686тЖТ */
   687тЖТexport function recordPollingFallbackActivation(reason: 'webhook_timeout' | 'manual' | 'circuit_breaker'): void {
   688тЖТ  maximoMetrics.pollingTriggered.inc({ trigger_reason: reason });
   689тЖТ}
   690тЖТ
   691тЖТ/**
   692тЖТ * Update sync mode metric
   693тЖТ */
   694тЖТexport function updateSyncModeMetric(depotId: string, mode: 'WEBHOOK' | 'POLLING' | 'HYBRID'): void {
   695тЖТ  const modeValue = mode === 'WEBHOOK' ? 0 : mode === 'POLLING' ? 1 : 2;
   696тЖТ  maximoMetrics.syncMode.set({ depot_id: depotId }, modeValue);
   697тЖТ  maximoMetrics.pollingFallbackActive.set({ depot_id: depotId }, mode !== 'WEBHOOK' ? 1 : 0);
   698тЖТ}
   699тЖТ
   700тЖТ// =============================================================================
   701тЖТ// Rate Limiting Metrics
   702тЖТ// =============================================================================
   703тЖТ
   704тЖТ/**
   705тЖТ * Rate limiting metrics for monitoring and alerting
   706тЖТ *
   707тЖТ * @see specs/005-api.md - Rate Limiting: 100 requests/minute per user
   708тЖТ */
   709тЖТexport const rateLimitMetrics = {
   710тЖТ  /**
   711тЖТ   * Total rate limit checks performed
   712тЖТ   */
   713тЖТ  rateLimitChecks: new Counter({
   714тЖТ    name: 'mms_rate_limit_checks_total',
   715тЖТ    help: 'Total number of rate limit checks performed',
   716тЖТ    labelNames: ['identifier_type', 'result'] as const,
   717тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   718тЖТ  }),
   719тЖТ
   720тЖТ  /**
   721тЖТ   * Rate limit exceeded events
   722тЖТ   */
   723тЖТ  rateLimitExceeded: new Counter({
   724тЖТ    name: 'mms_rate_limit_exceeded_total',
   725тЖТ    help: 'Total number of requests rejected due to rate limiting',
   726тЖТ    labelNames: ['identifier_type'] as const,
   727тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   728тЖТ  }),
   729тЖТ
   730тЖТ  /**
   731тЖТ   * Current rate limit window usage per identifier
   732тЖТ   */
   733тЖТ  rateLimitUsage: new Gauge({
   734тЖТ    name: 'mms_rate_limit_usage',
   735тЖТ    help: 'Current rate limit usage percentage',
   736тЖТ    labelNames: ['identifier_type'] as const,
   737тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   738тЖТ  }),
   739тЖТ};
   740тЖТ
   741тЖТ/**
   742тЖТ * Record rate limit check result
   743тЖТ */
   744тЖТexport function recordRateLimitCheck(
   745тЖТ  identifierType: 'user' | 'ip',
   746тЖТ  result: 'allowed' | 'exceeded'
   747тЖТ): void {
   748тЖТ  rateLimitMetrics.rateLimitChecks.inc({ identifier_type: identifierType, result });
   749тЖТ  if (result === 'exceeded') {
   750тЖТ    rateLimitMetrics.rateLimitExceeded.inc({ identifier_type: identifierType });
   751тЖТ  }
   752тЖТ}

1тЖТ/**
     2тЖТ * MMS Logging Configuration
     3тЖТ *
     4тЖТ * Structured logging with Pino for consistent log format across all services.
     5тЖТ * Features:
     6тЖТ * - JSON format in production
     7тЖТ * - Pretty print in development
     8тЖТ * - Sensitive field redaction
     9тЖТ * - Request ID propagation
    10тЖТ * - OpenTelemetry trace context
    11тЖТ *
    12тЖТ * @see specs/004-backend-specification.md Section 4.14
    13тЖТ */
    14тЖТ
    15тЖТimport pino, { type Logger, type LoggerOptions } from 'pino';
    16тЖТ
    17тЖТconst isDevelopment = process.env['NODE_ENV'] === 'development';
    18тЖТ
    19тЖТ/**
    20тЖТ * Fields to redact from logs (prevents PII/secrets leakage)
    21тЖТ */
    22тЖТconst REDACT_PATHS = [
    23тЖТ  'password',
    24тЖТ  'passwordHash',
    25тЖТ  'password_hash',
    26тЖТ  'token',
    27тЖТ  'accessToken',
    28тЖТ  'refreshToken',
    29тЖТ  'apiKey',
    30тЖТ  'api_key',
    31тЖТ  'authorization',
    32тЖТ  'cookie',
    33тЖТ  'creditCard',
    34тЖТ  'ssn',
    35тЖТ  '*.password',
    36тЖТ  '*.token',
    37тЖТ  '*.apiKey',
    38тЖТ  'req.headers.authorization',
    39тЖТ  'req.headers.cookie',
    40тЖТ];
    41тЖТ
    42тЖТ/**
    43тЖТ * Base logger configuration
    44тЖТ */
    45тЖТconst baseOptions: LoggerOptions = {
    46тЖТ  level: process.env['LOG_LEVEL'] ?? (isDevelopment ? 'debug' : 'info'),
    47тЖТ  redact: {
    48тЖТ    paths: REDACT_PATHS,
    49тЖТ    censor: '[REDACTED]',
    50тЖТ  },
    51тЖТ  formatters: {
    52тЖТ    level: (label) => ({ level: label }),
    53тЖТ    bindings: (bindings) => ({
    54тЖТ      pid: bindings.pid,
    55тЖТ      host: bindings.hostname,
    56тЖТ      service: process.env['SERVICE_NAME'] ?? 'mms',
    57тЖТ    }),
    58тЖТ  },
    59тЖТ  timestamp: pino.stdTimeFunctions.isoTime,
    60тЖТ  base: {
    61тЖТ    env: process.env['NODE_ENV'] ?? 'development',
    62тЖТ  },
    63тЖТ};
    64тЖТ
    65тЖТ/**
    66тЖТ * Development transport (pretty print)
    67тЖТ */
    68тЖТconst developmentTransport = {
    69тЖТ  target: 'pino-pretty',
    70тЖТ  options: {
    71тЖТ    colorize: true,
    72тЖТ    translateTime: 'HH:MM:ss.l',
    73тЖТ    ignore: 'pid,hostname',
    74тЖТ    singleLine: false,
    75тЖТ  },
    76тЖТ};
    77тЖТ
    78тЖТ/**
    79тЖТ * Create the root logger instance
    80тЖТ */
    81тЖТfunction createLogger(): Logger {
    82тЖТ  if (isDevelopment) {
    83тЖТ    return pino({
    84тЖТ      ...baseOptions,
    85тЖТ      transport: developmentTransport,
    86тЖТ    });
    87тЖТ  }
    88тЖТ
    89тЖТ  return pino(baseOptions);
    90тЖТ}
    91тЖТ
    92тЖТ/**
    93тЖТ * Root logger instance
    94тЖТ */
    95тЖТexport const logger = createLogger();
    96тЖТ
    97тЖТ/**
    98тЖТ * Create a child logger with additional context
    99тЖТ * Use for service-specific or request-specific logging
   100тЖТ */
   101тЖТexport function createChildLogger(context: Record<string, unknown>): Logger {
   102тЖТ  return logger.child(context);
   103тЖТ}
   104тЖТ
   105тЖТ/**
   106тЖТ * Create a request-scoped logger with trace context
   107тЖТ */
   108тЖТexport function createRequestLogger(requestId: string, traceId?: string): Logger {
   109тЖТ  return logger.child({
   110тЖТ    requestId,
   111тЖТ    ...(traceId && { traceId }),
   112тЖТ  });
   113тЖТ}
   114тЖТ
   115тЖТ/**
   116тЖТ * Log level type
   117тЖТ */
   118тЖТexport type LogLevel = 'trace' | 'debug' | 'info' | 'warn' | 'error' | 'fatal';
   119тЖТ
   120тЖТ/**
   121тЖТ * Structured error logging helper
   122тЖТ */
   123тЖТexport function logError(
   124тЖТ  log: Logger,
   125тЖТ  error: Error,
   126тЖТ  context?: Record<string, unknown>
   127тЖТ): void {
   128тЖТ  const errObj: Record<string, unknown> = {
   129тЖТ    message: error.message,
   130тЖТ    name: error.name,
   131тЖТ    stack: error.stack,
   132тЖТ  };
   133тЖТ  if (error.cause) {
   134тЖТ    errObj.cause = error.cause;
   135тЖТ  }
   136тЖТ  log.error(
   137тЖТ    {
   138тЖТ      err: errObj,
   139тЖТ      ...context,
   140тЖТ    },
   141тЖТ    error.message
   142тЖТ  );
   143тЖТ}
   144тЖТ
   145тЖТ/**
   146тЖТ * Performance timing helper
   147тЖТ */
   148тЖТexport function logTiming(
   149тЖТ  log: Logger,
   150тЖТ  operation: string,
   151тЖТ  durationMs: number,
   152тЖТ  context?: Record<string, unknown>
   153тЖТ): void {
   154тЖТ  const level: LogLevel = durationMs > 1000 ? 'warn' : 'info';
   155тЖТ  log[level](
   156тЖТ    {
   157тЖТ      operation,
   158тЖТ      durationMs,
   159тЖТ      ...context,
   160тЖТ    },
   161тЖТ    `${operation} completed in ${durationMs}ms`
   162тЖТ  );
   163тЖТ}
   164тЖТ
   165тЖТexport default logger;
   166тЖТ

<system-reminder>

But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.

Perfect! Now I have all the information I need to provide a comprehensive report. Let me compile my findings:

## Infrastructure Implementation Status Report

### Specification Reference
**Spec:** `specs/008-operations.md` (Version 2.0 - APPROVED FOR DEVELOPMENT)

---

## 1. DOCKERFILES

All 5 required Docker images have been implemented:

### тЬУ mms-backend
- **Location:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/docker/Dockerfile.backend`
- **Base Image:** `oven/bun:1.1-alpine` (production)
- **Multi-stage:** Yes (dependencies, builder, production)
- **Size target:** <200MB тЬУ
- **Non-root user:** Yes (mms:mms) тЬУ
- **Health check:** Yes - `wget --no-verbose --tries=1 --spider http://localhost:3000/health` тЬУ
- **Port:** 3000

### тЬУ mms-frontend
- **Location:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/docker/Dockerfile.frontend`
- **Base Image:** `nginx:1.25-alpine` (production), `oven/bun:1.1-alpine` (dev)
- **Multi-stage:** Yes (4 stages: dependencies, development, builder, production)
- **Size target:** <50MB тЬУ
- **Non-root user:** Yes (nginx) тЬУ
- **Health check:** Yes - `wget --no-verbose --tries=1 --spider http://localhost:80/health` тЬУ
- **Port:** 80 (production), 5173 (development)
- **SPA routing:** Configured via nginx

### тЬУ mms-worker
- **Location:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/docker/Dockerfile.worker`
- **Base Image:** `oven/bun:1.1-alpine`
- **Multi-stage:** Yes (dependencies, builder, production)
- **Size target:** <200MB тЬУ
- **Non-root user:** Yes (mms:mms) тЬУ
- **Health check:** Yes - process check via `pgrep` тЬУ
- **Notes:** Supports selective workers via WORKERS env var, optimizer binary mount point configured

### тЬУ mms-file-watcher
- **Location:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/docker/Dockerfile.file-watcher`
- **Base Image:** `oven/bun:1.1-alpine`
- **Multi-stage:** Yes (dependencies, builder, production)
- **Size target:** <150MB тЬУ
- **Non-root user:** Yes (mms:mms) тЬУ
- **Health check:** Yes - process check via `pgrep` тЬУ
- **Data directories:** /data/inbox, /data/quarantine

### тЬУ mms-optimizer
- **Location:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/mms-optimizer/Dockerfile`
- **Base Image:** `debian:bookworm-slim`
- **Multi-stage:** Yes (builder, runtime)
- **Size target:** <500MB тЬУ
- **Non-root user:** Yes (optimizer) тЬУ
- **OR-Tools:** v9.8.3296 via binary release (faster than building from source)
- **Binary stripping:** Yes (for smaller size)

---

## 2. DOCKER COMPOSE

### тЬУ docker-compose.yml
- **Location:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/docker-compose.yml`
- **Status:** Fully implemented for development

**Services included:**
- `postgres:` TimescaleDB 2.14.2-pg16 with health check
- `redis:` Redis 7-alpine with health checks
- `backend:` Bun + Hono API (port 3000)
- `worker:` BullMQ workers
- `frontend:` Vite dev server (port 5173)
- `file-watcher:` Mileage CSV watcher
- `optimizer:` C++ OR-Tools sidecar
- `redis-commander:` Web UI (profile: tools)
- `pgadmin:` PostgreSQL UI (profile: tools)

**Features:**
- All services use named volumes for data persistence
- Network: mms-network (bridge driver)
- Health checks on postgres, redis, backend
- Service dependencies with `condition: service_healthy`
- Development watch configuration for hot reload
- Proper environment variable management

### Missing: docker-compose.dev.yml
тЭМ Separate dev composition file not found

---

## 3. KUBERNETES MANIFESTS

### тЭМ k8s/ directory
**Status:** NOT IMPLEMENTED
- No k8s/ directory exists
- No Deployment manifests
- No Service definitions
- No ConfigMap templates
- No HPA configurations
- No Network policies
- No Pod Security Policies

The specification includes complete K8s manifests (sections 8.3.1-8.3.3) but they have not been created in the repository.

---

## 4. CI/CD PIPELINE

### тЭМ GitHub Actions Workflows
**Status:** NOT IMPLEMENTED
- No `.github/workflows/` directory exists
- No GitHub Actions workflow files
- No build pipeline
- No test automation
- No deployment stages
- No registry login/image push configuration

The specification includes a comprehensive workflow (section 8.7.1) for:
- Test job (lint, typecheck, unit tests, coverage)
- Build job (multi-image Docker build)
- Deploy staging
- Deploy production with canary strategy

---

## 5. DATABASE OPERATIONS

### тЬУ Drizzle ORM Configuration
- **Location:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/drizzle.config.ts`
- **Schema:** `./src/lib/db/schema/index.ts`
- **Migration output:** `./drizzle/`
- **Strict mode:** Yes тЬУ
- **Verbose:** Yes тЬУ
- **Breakpoints:** Enabled тЬУ

### тЬУ Migration Scripts
**Available commands in package.json:**
```bash
db:generate    # Generate migration from schema changes
db:migrate     # Apply migrations (uses drizzle-kit)
db:push        # Push schema to dev database
db:studio      # Open Drizzle Studio
```

**Migration table:** `__drizzle_migrations` in public schema

### тЪа Manual migrations directory
- **Location:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/drizzle/manual/`
- Mounted to postgres container at `/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d`
- Used for initial schema bootstrap

### тЭМ Missing from spec:
- WAL archiving configuration (wal-g backup-push)
- Backup scripts
- Point-in-time recovery setup
- Database performance tuning scripts (pg.conf)
- Disaster recovery runbooks

---

## 6. MONITORING & OBSERVABILITY

### тЬУ Prometheus Metrics
**Location:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/src/lib/metrics/index.ts`
**Fully implemented with 60+ metrics across:**

**HTTP Metrics:**
- `mms_http_requests_total` (Counter)
- `mms_http_request_duration_seconds` (Histogram with 9 buckets)
- `mms_http_requests_in_flight` (Gauge)

**PM Scheduling Metrics:**
- `mms_pm_scheduled_total`
- `mms_pm_compliance_window_days`
- `mms_pm_deferred_total`

**Optimizer Metrics:**
- `mms_optimizer_solve_seconds` (with solver_type, status labels)
- `mms_optimizer_runs_total`
- `mms_optimizer_objective_value`
- `mms_optimizer_fallbacks_total`

**Fleet Metrics:**
- `mms_fleet_mileage_km`
- `mms_fleet_train_status`
- `mms_fleet_available_trains`

**Drift Metrics:**
- `mms_drift_trains_requiring_replan`
- `mms_drift_mileage_percent`
- `mms_drift_analysis_total`

**Queue Metrics:**
- `mms_queue_jobs_total`
- `mms_queue_job_duration_seconds`
- `mms_queue_depth`

**Ingestion Metrics:**
- `mms_ingestion_files_total`
- `mms_ingestion_rows_total`
- `mms_ingestion_anomalies_total`

**Man-hour Metrics:**
- `mms_manhour_utilization_percent`
- `mms_manhour_overloaded_periods`
- `mms_manhour_adjustments_total`

**Maximo Integration Metrics:**
- Sync, webhook, polling, circuit breaker, conflict, shadow record metrics

**Costing Metrics:**
- TCO projections, variance calculations

**Rate Limiting Metrics:**
- `mms_rate_limit_checks_total`
- `mms_rate_limit_exceeded_total`
- `mms_rate_limit_usage`

**Database Metrics:**
- `mms_db_query_duration_seconds`
- `mms_db_connection_pool_size`
- `mms_db_errors_total`

**Helper functions:**
- `measureHttpRequest()`
- `recordQueueJob()`
- `recordOptimizerRun()`
- `recordIngestionComplete()`
- `recordMaximoSync()`
- `recordMaximoWebhook()`

### тЬУ Prometheus Endpoint
- **Path:** `/metrics`
- **Format:** Prometheus text format
- **Response headers:** Correct content-type set
- **Implementation:** Lines 174-179 in `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/src/api/index.ts`

### тЬУ Logging Configuration
**Location:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/src/lib/logging/logger.ts`
- **Framework:** Pino v9.6.0
- **Format:** JSON in production, pretty-print in development
- **Level:** Configurable via LOG_LEVEL env var (default: debug/info)
- **Redaction:** Automatic PII/secrets redaction (passwords, tokens, API keys, SSN, etc.)
- **Structured logging:** Context and trace ID propagation
- **Performance:** Timing logging helper for slow operations

### тЬУ OpenTelemetry Tracing
**Location:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/src/api/middleware/tracing.ts`
- **Version:** @opentelemetry/api v1.9.0, sdk-trace-base v1.30.0
- **Integration:** Middleware-based HTTP tracing
- **Span creation:** Per HTTP request with attributes
- **Attributes captured:**
  - `http.method`, `http.url`, `http.route`
  - `http.request_id` (for correlation)
  - `http.user_agent`
  - `http.status_code`, `http.duration_ms`
  - User context (id, roles) when authenticated

### тЭМ Missing from spec:
- Grafana dashboard configurations (JSON files)
- AlertManager/Prometheus alert rules
- Metric storage (Prometheus server config)
- Log aggregation (ELK, Loki, etc.)
- Tracing backend (Jaeger, Zipkin configuration)
- Default Node.js metrics collection is enabled

---

## 7. HEALTH CHECK ENDPOINTS

### тЬУ /health (Liveness)
- **Path:** `/health`
- **Status:** 200 always if process is running
- **Response:** `{ status: 'healthy', timestamp: '...' }`
- **Docker healthcheck:** All 5 images have HEALTHCHECK directives

### тЬУ /ready (Readiness)
- **Path:** `/ready`
- **Dependencies checked:**
  - Database (via `SELECT 1` query)
  - Redis (via PING)
  - Both checked in parallel with 5-second timeout
- **Response codes:**
  - 200 if all services healthy
  - 503 if any service unhealthy
- **Response format:** `{ status: 'ready'|'not_ready', checks: { database, redis, errors, timestamp } }`
- **Implementation:** Lines 117-164 in API server

### тЬУ Database Health Check
- **Function:** `checkDatabaseHealth()`
- **Location:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/src/lib/db/connection.ts`
- **Query:** `SELECT 1 as health`
- **Returns:** Boolean

### тЬУ Redis Health Check
- **Function:** `checkRedisHealth()`
- **Location:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/src/lib/redis/connection.ts`
- **Command:** PING
- **Returns:** Boolean (checks for 'PONG' response)

### Frontend Health Check
- **Path:** `/health` on nginx
- **Implementation:** Lines 68-73 in nginx.conf
- **Response:** `OK` with `Content-Type: text/plain`
- **Logging:** Disabled (access_log off)

---

## 8. SECURITY CONFIGURATION

### тЬУ Implemented
- Non-root users in all Dockerfiles (mms:mms for services, nginx for frontend, optimizer for optimizer)
- Secure headers in API (via Hono middleware)
- CORS configuration
- Rate limiting (100 req/min per user, 10 req/min for auth)
- JWT secret management via env vars
- Sensitive field redaction in logs

### тЭМ Missing from spec:
- Network policies (K8s)
- Pod security policies (K8s)
- External secrets integration (Vault, etc.)
- TLS/mTLS configuration
- RBAC definitions

---

## 9. PERFORMANCE CONFIGURATION

### тЬУ Implemented
- Database connection pooling (size: 20)
- Redis optimization (maxmemory: 256mb, maxmemory-policy: allkeys-lru)
- Nginx compression (gzip level 6, min 256 bytes)
- Nginx caching (static assets: 1y, index.html: no-cache)
- Node.js memory and CPU monitoring via Prometheus
- Histogram buckets for latency percentiles

### тЭМ Missing:
- PostgreSQL performance tuning config (postgresql.conf)
- Index recommendations
- Query performance analysis templates
- Horizontal Pod Autoscaler definitions

---

## 10. SUMMARY TABLE

| Component | Spec Requirement | Implemented | Status |
|-----------|------------------|-------------|--------|
| mms-frontend Dockerfile | Yes | Yes | тЬУ |
| mms-backend Dockerfile | Yes | Yes | тЬУ |
| mms-worker Dockerfile | Yes | Yes | тЬУ |
| mms-optimizer Dockerfile | Yes | Yes | тЬУ |
| mms-file-watcher Dockerfile | Yes | Yes | тЬУ |
| docker-compose.yml | Yes | Yes | тЬУ |
| docker-compose.dev.yml | Yes | No | тЭМ |
| Kubernetes Deployments | Yes | No | тЭМ |
| Kubernetes Services | Yes | No | тЭМ |
| Kubernetes ConfigMaps | Yes | No | тЭМ |
| Kubernetes HPA | Yes | No | тЭМ |
| Kubernetes Network Policies | Yes | No | тЭМ |
| GitHub Actions CI/CD | Yes | No | тЭМ |
| /health endpoint | Yes | Yes | тЬУ |
| /ready endpoint | Yes | Yes | тЬУ |
| /metrics endpoint | Yes | Yes | тЬУ |
| Prometheus metrics | Yes | Yes (60+) | тЬУ |
| OpenTelemetry tracing | Yes | Yes | тЬУ |
| Structured logging (Pino) | Yes | Yes | тЬУ |
| Database migrations (Drizzle) | Yes | Yes | тЬУ |
| Health checks (DB/Redis) | Yes | Yes | тЬУ |
| Nginx configuration | Yes | Yes | тЬУ |
| Non-root users | Yes | Yes | тЬУ |
| Security headers | Yes | Yes | тЬУ |
| Rate limiting | Yes | Yes | тЬУ |

---

## 11. CRITICAL GAPS

1. **Kubernetes Infrastructure (Major):** No K8s manifests implemented. Production deployment strategy is missing.
2. **CI/CD Pipeline (Major):** No GitHub Actions workflows. No automated testing or deployment pipeline.
